entry.title: MiniMax M2.7
entry.summary: Released MiniMax-M2.7 series (MiniMax-M2.7 / M2.7-highspeed). Beginning the journey of recursive self-improvement.

entry.title: Music2.5+
entry.summary: Released Music2.5+, Instrumental Unlocked, break through style boundaries

entry.title: MiniMax M2.5
entry.summary: Released MiniMax-M2.5 series models (MiniMax-M2.5 / M2.5-highspeed). Achieving or setting new SOTA benchmarks in programming, tool calling and search, office productivity and other scenarios.

entry.title: Speech-2.8
entry.summary: Natural Sound Tags, lifelike voice, pristine audio quality

entry.title: Music-2.5
entry.summary: Released Music 2.5, Direct the Detail. Define the Real.

entry.title: MiniMax-M2.1
entry.summary: Released MiniMax-M2.1. Polyglot Programming Mastery, Precision Code Refactoring.

entry.title: Speech-2.6
entry.summary: Released Speech 2.6 — More human and instantly responsive voice for your agent.

entry.title: Music-2.0
entry.summary: Released Music 2.0, enhanced musical expression that makes every melody deeply emotional.

entry.title: MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3 & 2.3-Fast
entry.summary: Released MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3 & 2.3-Fast, featuring breakthroughs in body movement, facial expressions, physical realism, and prompt adherence.

entry.title: MiniMax-M2
entry.summary: MiniMax-M2 Released. An Efficient Model for the Agentic Era. Get free MiniMax M2 model API calls now. Offer ends November 7, 2025, at 00:00 UTC.

entry.title: Music-1.5
entry.summary: New music model released. Now supports 4-minute songs, getting back to the core of great sound.

entry.title: Speech-2.5
entry.summary: Released a next-generation speech synthesis model featuring broader language coverage and exceptionally high voice similarity.

entry.title: Music-1.5 (Beta)
entry.summary: Released Music-1.5 (Beta), a next-generation music generation model that supports creating music from musical prompts and lyrics.

entry.title: MiniMax-Hailuo-02
entry.summary: Released MiniMax Hailuo 02, a next-generation video generation model with support for 1080p resolution and video generation of up to 10 seconds.

entry.title: Speech-02-turbo / Speech-02-hd
entry.summary: Released the Speech-02 model series, delivering hyper-realistic vocal performance. The models are distinguished by exceptional prosody and stability, along with outstanding voice similarity and audio quality.

entry.title: Image-01
entry.summary: Released the Image-01 model, which supports text-to-image generation in multiple sizes.

entry.title: T2V-01-Director / I2V-01-Director
entry.summary: Released a video generation model with enhanced camera control, offering superior adherence to camera movement directives and enabling cinematic storytelling through its shot composition.

entry.title: MiniMax-Text-01 / MiniMax-VL-01
entry.summary: Released the next-generation text model, MiniMax-Text-01, and the vision-language model, MiniMax-VL-01.
